name: Primal Beast
description: RAAAWR Primal Beast Though the deterioration of the Mistwood and its evolution from idyllic expanse to death-filled tanglewild was a slow, wizard-fueled process, most scholars agree the true beginning of the end was marked by the interdimensional arrival of the Primal Beast. A creature hatched into an existence devoid of all feeling but hunger and pain, aeons of carnage shaped the Primal Beast into the apex predator on a planet filled with violent terrors.

abilities.name: Colossal
abilities.description: Grants the Beast outgoing damage amplification on buildings.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description: The Beast charges through in chosen the direction with a limited turn rate. Knocking both allies and enemies alike.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.description: The Beast cannot be slowed and ignores root sources applied to him while trampling!

abilities.name: Uproar
abilities.description: The Beast accumulate Uproar stacks for every offensive damage instance it takes. When activated, the Beast releases a roar that slows enemy units within the radius, while granting self additional bonus attack damage and bonus armor based on the current stack amount.

abilities.name: Rock Throw
abilities.description: The Beast throws a rock at the target location that stuns and damages enemies. Grants stacks as long as component is applied on an enemy hero.

abilities.name: Pulverize
abilities.description: The Beast grabs the target enemy and slams them into the ground repeatedly. Damages and stuns other enemy units within the radius. Each consecutive slam increases the damage dealt. Each successful slam instantly grants Primal Beast a stackable general area-of-effect bonus for a short duration.
